summary: Average show with too‑much keyboard and not enough Garcia, recording quality unclear
review: The reviewer feels the performance suffers from an over‑abundance of keyboards during the Welnick/Hornsby era and a shortage of Garcia’s presence, though they note some enjoyable jamming. No specific comments about the audio source or sound quality are provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑rating review; it points out musical balance issues but also mentions positive jamming, while offering no information on recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments about sound clarity, mix or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No details on set structure or pacing were mentioned.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Reviewer notes there is not enough Garcia in the mix.
band_member_comments.Keys: Too much keyboard presence during this period.
